payload.answer: Treat this as a superseding employment update: Sam's current employer should be Point72, and the Goldman employment should be retained only as past employment, not as a current fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, and provides a clear employment transition that supersedes the prior current employer.

memory_cards.statement: Sam previously worked at Goldman and has left that job.

details: Detected direct contradiction with an existing current employment fact.
Resolved by replacing the current employer with Point72.
Preserved the prior Goldman employment only as historical, avoiding presentation of superseded information as current.

repair_options: Mark the existing current fact 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current.
Store 'Sam works at Point72' as the new current employment fact.
Retain Goldman only as historical employment.
If dates become available later, attach end/start dates to the transition.

raw_text: {"intent":"update_person_employment","decision":"supersede_existing_current_employment_and_store_transition","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_fact","statement":"Sam works at Point72.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"employee"},{"name":"Point72","type":"organization","role":"employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at","object":"Point72"}]},{"kind":"historical_fact","statement":"Sam previously worked at Goldman and has left that job.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"former_employee"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"former_employer"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"formerly_worked_at","object":"Goldman"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_existing","entity_id":null,"reason":"The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, and provides a clear employment transition that supersedes the prior current employer."},"conflict_classification":"employment_transition_superseding_current_fact","answer":"Treat this as a superseding employment update: Sam's current employer should be Point72, and the Goldman employment should be retained only as past employment, not as a current fact.","citations":[],"repair_options":["Mark the existing current fact 'Sam works at Goldman' as no longer current.","Store 'Sam works at Point72' as the new current employment fact.","Retain Goldman only as historical employment.","If dates become available later, attach end/start dates to the transition."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected direct contradiction with an existing current employment fact.","Resolved by replacing the current employer with Point72.","Preserved the prior Goldman employment only as historical, avoiding presentation of superseded information as current."]}}
